Stratagems

From Helldivers Wiki
Jump to navigation Jump to search
Stratagems
  Helldivers 2   Helldivers 1    
Looking for something that isn't here? Check out Category:Stratagems for all Stratagem related articles

The following stratagems are found in Helldivers 2. Helldivers can select up to four different stratagems when defining their loadout for a Mission.

Contents

  • 1 Stratagem Overview
  • 2 Current Stratagems
    • 2.1 Support Weapons
    • 2.2 Orbital Strikes
    • 2.3 Eagle Strikes
    • 2.4 Emplacements
    • 2.5 Sentries
    • 2.6 Backpacks
    • 2.7 Vehicles
  • 3 Mission Stratagems
    • 3.1 Ship
    • 3.2 Objective
    • 3.3 Other
  • 4 Gallery
  • 5 Trivia
  • 6 References

Stratagem Overview

Previews of all stratagems can be seen on this page.

Current Stratagems

Support Weapons

Icon Name Stratagem Code Base Cooldown Cost Unlock Level Source
MG-43 Machine Gun 480s Free 1 Patriotic Administration Center
EAT-17 Expendable Anti-Tank 70s 3000 Requisition Slips 3 Patriotic Administration Center
M-105 Stalwart 480s 3500 Requisition Slips 1 Patriotic Administration Center
LAS-98 Laser Cannon 480s 4000 Requisition Slips 5 Engineering Bay
APW-1 Anti-Materiel Rifle 480s 5000 Requisition Slips 1 Patriotic Administration Center
GL-21 Grenade Launcher 480s 6000 Requisition Slips 5 Engineering Bay
GR-8 Recoilless Rifle 480s 6000 Requisition Slips 5 Patriotic Administration Center
FLAM-40 Flamethrower 480s 6000 Requisition Slips 10 Patriotic Administration Center
MG-206 Heavy Machine Gun 480s 6000 Requisition Slips 12 Patriotic Administration Center
AC-8 Autocannon 480s 7000 Requisition Slips 10 Patriotic Administration Center
ARC-3 Arc Thrower 480s 7000 Requisition Slips 15 Engineering Bay
LAS-99 Quasar Cannon 480s 7500 Requisition Slips 18 Engineering Bay
RL-77 Airburst Rocket Launcher 480s 8000 Requisition Slips 15 Patriotic Administration Center
MLS-4X Commando 120s 8000 Requisition Slips 15 Patriotic Administration Center
FAF-14 Spear 480s 9000 Requisition Slips 20 Patriotic Administration Center
RS-422 Railgun 480s 10000 Requisition Slips 20 Patriotic Administration Center
StA-X3 W.A.S.P. Launcher 480s 12000 Requisition Slips 20 Patriotic Administration Center
CQC-20 Breaching Hammer 480s 75 Medals N/A Siege Breakers P1
PLAS-45 Epoch 480s 75 Medals N/A Control Group P1
MGX-42 Bullet Storm 70s 75 Medals N/A Exo Experts P1
S-11 Speargun 480s 85 Medals N/A Dust Devils P2
CQC-9 Defoliation Tool 480s 85 Medals N/A Python Commandos P2
TX-41 Sterilizer 480s 85 Medals N/A Chemical Agents P2
EAT-700 Expendable Napalm 140s 85 Medals N/A Dust Devils P2
EAT-411 Leveller 140s 85 Medals N/A Siege Breakers P2
GL-52 De-Escalator 480s 85 Medals N/A Force of Law P2
GL-28 Belt-Fed Grenade Launcher 480s 110 Medals N/A Siege Breakers P3
B/MD C4 Pack 480s 110 Medals N/A Redacted Regiment P3
MS-11 Solo Silo 180s 110 Medals N/A Dust Devils P3
B/FLAM-80 Cremator 480s 110 Medals N/A Entrenched Division P3
M-1000 Maxigun 480s 110 Medals N/A Python Commandos P3
CQC-1 One True Flag 480s 110 Medals N/A Masters of Ceremony P3

Orbital Strikes

Icon Name Stratagem Code Base Cooldown Cost Unlock Level Source
Orbital Precision Strike 90s Free 1 Bridge
Orbital Gatling Barrage 70s 1500 Requisition Slips 1 Orbital Cannons
Orbital Gas Strike 75s 4000 Requisition Slips 1 Bridge
Orbital 120mm HE Barrage 180s 4000 Requisition Slips 5 Orbital Cannons
Orbital Airburst Strike 100s 4000 Requisition Slips 5 Orbital Cannons
Orbital Smoke Strike 75s 4000 Requisition Slips 8 Bridge
Orbital EMS Strike 75s 6000 Requisition Slips 5 Bridge
Orbital 380mm HE Barrage 240s 7500 Requisition Slips 8 Orbital Cannons
Orbital Walking Barrage 240s 7500 Requisition Slips 10 Orbital Cannons
Orbital Laser 300s 10000 Requisition Slips 15 Orbital Cannons
Orbital Napalm Barrage 240s 10000 Requisition Slips 18 Orbital Cannons
Orbital Railcannon Strike 180s 10000 Requisition Slips 20 Orbital Cannons

Eagle Strikes

Icon Name Stratagem Code Base Cooldown Cost Unlock Level Source
Eagle Strafing Run 15s 1500 Requisition Slips 1 Hangar
Eagle Airstrike 15s 4000 Requisition Slips 1 Hangar
Eagle Cluster Bomb 15s 4000 Requisition Slips 3 Hangar
Eagle Smoke Strike 15s 4000 Requisition Slips 8 Hangar
Eagle Napalm Airstrike 15s 5000 Requisition Slips 5 Hangar
Eagle 110mm Rocket Pods 15s 7500 Requisition Slips 10 Hangar
Eagle 500kg Bomb 15s 10000 Requisition Slips 15 Hangar

Icon Name Stratagem Code Base Cooldown Cost Unlock Level Source
MD-6 Anti-Personnel Minefield 120s 1500 Requisition Slips 1 Engineering Bay
MD-I4 Incendiary Mines 120s 4000 Requisition Slips 8 Engineering Bay
MD-17 Anti-Tank Mines 120s 7000 Requisition Slips 15 Engineering Bay
FX-12 Shield Generator Relay 90s 9000 Requisition Slips 10 Bridge
E/MG-101 HMG Emplacement 180s 10000 Requisition Slips 10 Bridge
E/GL-21 Grenadier Battlement 120s 10000 Requisition Slips 15 Bridge
MD-8 Gas Mines 120s 12000 Requisition Slips 20 Engineering Bay
E/AT-12 Anti-Tank Emplacement 180s 110 Medals N/A Urban Legends P3

Sentries

Icon Name Stratagem Code Base Cooldown Cost Unlock Level Source
A/MG-43 Machine Gun Sentry 90s 1500 Requisition Slips 1 Robotics Workshop
A/G-16 Gatling Sentry 150s 4000 Requisition Slips 5 Robotics Workshop
A/AC-8 Autocannon Sentry 150s 6000 Requisition Slips 13 Robotics Workshop
A/M-12 Mortar Sentry 180s 7000 Requisition Slips 8 Robotics Workshop
A/MLS-4X Rocket Sentry 150s 7500 Requisition Slips 15 Robotics Workshop
A/ARC-3 Tesla Tower 120s 8000 Requisition Slips 15 Bridge
A/M-23 EMS Mortar Sentry 180s 8000 Requisition Slips 20 Robotics Workshop
A/LAS-98 Laser Sentry 150s 85 Medals N/A Control Group P2
A/FLAM-40 Flame Sentry 100s 85 Medals N/A Urban Legends P2
A/GM-17 Gas Mortar Sentry 180s 85 Medals N/A Entrenched Division P2

Icon Name Stratagem Code Base Cooldown Cost Unlock Level Source
B-1 Supply Pack 480s 4000 Requisition Slips 1 Engineering Bay
LIFT-850 Jump Pack 480s 6000 Requisition Slips 8 Hangar
SH-20 Ballistic Shield Backpack 240s 6000 Requisition Slips 12 Engineering Bay
AX/AR-23 Guard Dog 480s 7500 Requisition Slips 10 Engineering Bay
AX/LAS-5 Rover 480s 7500 Requisition Slips 10 Engineering Bay
SH-32 Shield Generator Pack 480s 10000 Requisition Slips 20 Engineering Bay
SH-51 Directional Shield 300s 75 Medals N/A Urban Legends P1
AX/FLAM-75 Hot Dog 480s 75 Medals N/A Python Commandos P1
B-100 Portable Hellbomb 300s 110 Medals N/A Servants of Freedom P3
AX/ARC-3 K-9 480s 110 Medals N/A Force of Law P3
LIFT-860 Hover Pack 480s 110 Medals N/A Borderline Justice P3
AX/TX-13 Dog Breath 480s 110 Medals N/A Chemical Agents P3
LIFT-182 Warp Pack 480s 110 Medals N/A Control Group P3

Vehicles

Icon Name Stratagem Code Base Cooldown Cost Unlock Level Source
M-103 Supply FRV 480s N/A N/A Hangar
M-104 Incinerator FRV 480s N/A N/A Hangar
EXO-49 Emancipator Exosuit 420s 20000 Requisition Slips 25 Robotics Workshop
EXO-45 Patriot Exosuit 420s 20000 Requisition Slips 25 Robotics Workshop
M-102 Fast Recon Vehicle 480s 25000 Requisition Slips 25 Hangar
TD-220 Bastion MK XVI 780s 35000 Requisition Slips 1 Hangar
EXO-55 Breakthrough Exosuit 420s 50 Medal N/A Exo Experts P3
EXO-51 Lumberer Exosuit 420s 50 Medal N/A Exo Experts P2

Gallery

  • A Stratagem Permit

Trivia

  • The cost of one Stratagem is more than the average annual income for a Super Earth Citizen.[1]

References

  1. ↑ Ship_Master#Voice_Lines
  • Ship Master dialogue referring to Stratagem cost.
